blended.narrative: Mount Sunapee is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 2.1 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 3,704 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 7 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Today: 5" of snow, highs of 30°F. Expect variable conditions.
Saturday: 2.8" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
